response.justification: Bogdan has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background. However, his profile aligns more closely with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy. He lacks the deep, recognized expertise in artificial intelligence, machine learning, and enterprise-level strategic advisory required for this specific role.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse tech stacks.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the founder of GISCollective.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's/PhD) or recognized, long-term industry expertise in AI/ML.
No demonstrated experience operating at a Director-level IC capacity driving enterprise-wide strategy.
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
